documents.title: Documentation
documents.description: Start here for CairnID architecture, API, deployment, operations, and release gates.

documents.title: Architecture
documents.description: Runtime components, crate boundaries, API modules, storage, and deployment flow.

documents.title: API
documents.description: Implemented HTTP, OIDC/OAuth, session, admin, MFA, account lifecycle, and SCIM APIs.

documents.title: Deployment
documents.description: Local Compose, container runtime, environment variables, and build notes.

documents.title: Operations
documents.description: Preflight, release evidence, backup, restore, key rotation, audit export, and drills.

documents.title: Security Posture
documents.description: Implemented controls, release evidence, gaps, and private reporting boundaries.

documents.title: Release Gates
documents.description: Required evidence before CairnID can be recommended for production use.

documents.title: Threat Model
documents.description: Assets, trust boundaries, controls, invariants, and residual risks.

documents.title: MFA
documents.description: TOTP, WebAuthn, recovery codes, session elevation, and MFA evidence.

documents.title: Account Lifecycle
documents.description: Invitations, email verification, password recovery, notifications, and outbox delivery.

documents.title: SCIM
documents.description: SCIM 2.0 provisioning subset, token rotation, smoke tests, and connector evidence.

documents.title: OpenID Conformance
documents.description: OpenID Foundation conformance preparation and evidence capture.

documents.title: Dependency Policy
documents.description: Dependency review, audit tooling, evidence receipts, and lockfile policy.

documents.title: Changelog
documents.description: Notable changes and release history for CairnID.

documents.title: Security Policy
documents.description: Supported versions, vulnerability reporting, triage targets, and disclosure handling.

documents.title: Support
documents.description: Support channels for usage questions, bug reports, and security reports.

documents.title: Roadmap
documents.description: Planned beta gates, future protocol coverage, and ongoing project constraints.
